# Bootstrap Summary: SEI Sales Coach

**Date**: 2026-02-08  
**Generated by**: /bootstrap command

## Interview: Questions & Answers

### Project Basics
- **What does your app do?** SEI Sales Coach is an interactive AI agent platform that helps SEI consultants practice and improve their sales conversations through simulated prospect interactions and scenario-based performance scoring.
- **Who are the users?** Internal SEI consultants, primarily senior level.
- **#1 problem solved?** Helps consultants practice consultative selling in a safe environment and get structured feedback tied to a real methodology.

### Platform & Scale
- **Platform**: Web app.
- **Year 1 users**: Under 100.
- **Specific requirements**: Real-time voice and text interaction required.

### Integrations & Data
- **Payments**: No.
- **Emails/notifications**: No notifications needed yet.
- **Integrations**: ElevenLabs (voice), Anthropic API (scoring + chat), Supabase (database + vector search), OpenAI (embeddings), Vercel (deployment).
- **Data types**: Session transcripts, scorecard results, knowledge base documents, agent prompts.

### Business Context
- **Timeline**: MVP already live, iterating fast.
- **Team**: Solo builder with occasional Cursor-assisted development.
- **Budget**: Free tools preferred; already paying for ElevenLabs and Supabase.

### Branding & Design Guidelines
- **Guidelines provided?** Yes.
- **Details**: Dark plum backgrounds, red-to-purple gradients, Lang Gothic typography. Positioning: "fresh perspectives with absolute accountability." Personality: Masterful, All-in, Good-Humored, Vigilant.

### Linear Project Setup
- **Create Linear project?** Yes.
- **Project name**: SEI Sales Coach App.

## Technical Decisions Made

| Decision | Choice | Business Reasoning |
|----------|--------|---------------------|
| Framework | Next.js (App Router) | Already in use; fast iteration, Vercel-native, good for real-time UI. |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector) | Already in use; free tier, vector search for RAG, single source of truth. |
| Hosting | Vercel | Already in use; free tier, seamless Next.js deploy. |
| AI | Anthropic + OpenAI + ElevenLabs | Already integrated; best-in-class for coach + embeddings + voice. |
| Payments | None | Not required. |
| Notifications | None | Not required yet. |
| Specs / SDD | specs/ + CLAUDE.md | Aligns future work with constitution and Linear. |

## Timeline & Cost Estimates

- **MVP**: Already live; ongoing iteration.
- **Monthly hosting (Year 1)**: ~$0–20 (Vercel free tier; Supabase and ElevenLabs as currently used).
- **Key milestones**: Iterate on coach flow, scorecard, and KB; keep voice and text in sync; maintain single config and RAG integrity.

## Brand & Design Guidelines

- **Summary**: Dark plum backgrounds, red-to-purple gradients, Lang Gothic typography. Positioning: "fresh perspectives with absolute accountability." Personality: Masterful, All-in, Good-Humored, Vigilant.
- **Added to CLAUDE.md**: Yes — see "Brand & Design Guidelines" section.

- **Project name**: SEI Sales Coach App.
- **Note**: Linear MCP was not connected during bootstrap. Create the project manually in Linear and link it when ready. Use the same name for spec and commit linking (see CLAUDE.md § Linear Integration).
